name: meta
description: Meta-engineering skills: risk assessment, incident handling, gap analysis, the harness (agent-team factory), and the PMF audit harness.

interface.shortDescription: Risk, incident, gap-analysis, harness factory, and PMF audit meta skills
interface.longDescription: Meta Engineering bundles reusable thinking frameworks and meta-skills: design risk assessment, incident response, and gap analysis before decisions become expensive; the harness — a team-architecture factory that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use; and the PMF audit harness that scores a dev tool / OSS on Time-to-First-Value, trust (false-positive economics), and wedge scoping.
defaultPrompt: Build a harness for this project
Audit this OSS for PMF before launch
